name: Nordic Scandi Oak Lounge Chair
description: A minimalist oak wood lounge chair with clean lines and soft upholstery, built for long, comfortable evenings at home.

name: Aura Sound ANC Wireless Headphones
description: Matte black over-ear headphones with adaptive noise cancelling, 30-hour battery life, and plush leather ear cups.

name: Terra Sculptural Table Lamp
description: A sculptural ceramic table lamp with a textured terracotta base and a wide linen shade, casting warm, diffused light.

name: Logos Slim Mechanical Keyboard
description: Ultra-thin mechanical keyboard with a silver aluminum chassis, low-profile keys, and hot-swappable switches.

name: Prism Glass Geometric Vase
description: An abstract geometric glass vase with an iridescent finish that refracts light into soft prisms across any room.

name: Sphere Gen 3 Smart Audio System
description: A smart circular speaker wrapped in premium acoustic fabric, blending seamlessly into any home environment.
